case_title: NG, SIMON vs. ANASSE, RACHID et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, SIMON AS TO DEFENDANT ANASSE, RACHID LIPF, PIERRE DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, SIMON SERVED AUG-13-1995, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT ANASSE, RACHID LIPF, PIERRE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, SIMON AS TO DEFENDANT ANASSE, RACHID LIPF, PIERRE
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, SIMON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, SIMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANASSE, RACHID LIPF, PIERRE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 173 COLLEGE AVE, LEASE FORFEITED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANASSE, RACHID LIPF, PIERRE

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT ANASSE, RACHID LIPF, PIERRE HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR NOTICE AND HEARING OF MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND FILED BY DEFENDANT ANASSE, RACHID LIPF, PIERRE
OPPOSITION MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT, VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT, & QUASH WRIT OF POSSESSION; DECL. OF ROBERT G. JACKSON FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, SIMON

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, CALENDAR OF SEP-12-1995 CASE SETTLED IN OPEN COURT ON THE RECORD: 1)DEFAULT JUDGMENT STANDS; 2) WRIT OF POSSESSION STAYED TIL 9/25/95 MIDNIGHT; 3) IF DEFENDANTS VACATE THE PREMISES BY 9/25/95, PLAINTIFF SHALL VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT & DISMISS CASE; 4)NON-NEGATIVE LETTER(S) ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT SHALL BE PROVIDED.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ANASSE, RACHID LIPF, PIERRE
ORDER THAT THE JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST DEFT. RACHID ANASSE BE SET ASIDE AND VACATED AND THAT PLAINTIFF SIMON NG FILE A DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION - GRANTED - DEPT. 2 - QUIDACHAY.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
